Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

I think we need a two functions 
1) find and return a reference for future use
2) find ni and return one or more fields from structure.

(1) want to hold a net lock as small as possible, and release when reference is obtained.
(2) can hold a net lock over whole function to obtain a data.

and from my view, locking changes is good to extract into separate branch / patchset.
Abandoned

parents.subject: LU-12756 lnet: Drop ref on peer_ni in lnet_nid2peerni_locked()

commit.subject: LU-12756 lnet: Drop addref in lnet_get_peer_ni_locked
commit.message:
LU-12756 lnet: Drop addref in lnet_get_peer_ni_locked

lnet_get_peer_ni_locked is only called by lnet_find_peer_ni_locked.
Most callers of lnet_find_peer_ni_locked() do not need the ref on
the peer_ni object returned by this function. Remove the addref
from lnet_get_peer_ni_locked, and adjust callers of
lnet_find_peer_ni_locked accordingly.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <hornc@cray.com>
Change-Id: I6f7765e60b381008e953a2d2c61df179dca4ce4f
